pubmed_links: [Ni et al. (2021) LncRNA-AC006129.1 reactivates a SOCS3-mediated anti-inflammatory response through DNA methylation-mediated CIC downregulation in schizophrenia](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32015466/)
summary: SOCS3, a suppressor of cytokine signaling that negatively regulates JAK/STAT inflammatory pathways, is dysregulated in schizophrenia; a schizophrenia-associated lncRNA promotes SOCS3 expression as part of an anti-inflammatory response, linking neuroinflammatory signaling to psychiatric disease. (emerging evidence)
